text:
Radium-223 or Lu-PSMA in mCRPC?
Bone-dominant disease → Radium-223 (+ Enza now OS-validated in PEACE-3).
PSMA+ systemic spread → Lu-PSMA.
Alpha vs beta. Bone-targeted vs whole-body.
Choose the biology.
